network.bannerApMode: You're on the setup network. Type your Wi-Fi network's name below.
network.bannerScanError: Couldn't scan for Wi-Fi networks. Enter your network details manually.
network.bannerNoneFound: No networks found. Rescan, or enter your network manually.
network.connecting: Connecting… this can take up to 30 seconds.
network.authFailed: Couldn't connect — check your password and try again.
network.connectTimeout: Still not connected. Please try again.
network.apRedirectBody: This device is switching to your Wi-Fi network, so the setup network will disappear. Reconnect your phone or computer to your normal Wi-Fi, then open http://snapdog.local to continue.

softap.title: Setup Access Point
softap.description: Creates a temporary Wi-Fi network on each boot when no Wi-Fi is configured and no Ethernet is connected. It stops automatically once a connection is established.
softap.countryHint: Wi-Fi regulatory domain — applies to both the setup AP and Wi-Fi connections.
softap.saveError: Couldn't save the setup access point.

network.disconnectConfirmBody: Wi-Fi is this device's only connection. Disconnecting will make SnapDog unreachable — including this page — and it won't reconnect on its own. You'd need to set it up again from the setup Wi-Fi.

audio.title: Audio
audio.autoDetectNone: Auto-detect is on — no audio device detected yet.

client.title: Client
client.latencyHint: Only change if you have sync issues. Default: 0
client.serverUnreachable: Server is not reachable. Save anyway?
client.serverTestFailed: Could not test server connection. Save anyway?
client.localServerHint: Local server is running. Client will connect automatically via mDNS.
client.connectionFailed: Server unreachable. Double check address & port.
client.noServersFound: No SnapDog servers detected on the local network.
client.autoConnectDesc: Connects dynamically to the first found server via mDNS

ssh.title: SSH
ssh.pubkeyRequired: Please add at least one SSH public key before enabling SSH.

system.title: System
system.factoryResetConfirm: This will erase all settings. Continue?
system.factoryResetWarning: This will erase all settings and restore factory defaults.
system.connectionLostDetail: Unable to connect to SnapDog OS. The device might be rebooting, performing an update, or offline.

update.title: Firmware Update
update.rollbackDetail: The previous update failed to boot and was automatically reverted.
update.manualDesc: Upload and flash a local system image directly without online checks.
update.manualWarningDesc1: Manual flashing bypasses automatic online signature and compatibility checks. Flashing an incorrect, corrupted, or unsupported system image WILL permanently damage or brick your device.
update.manualWarningDesc2: Make sure you have a valid RAUC update bundle (.raucb) built for your hardware revision. RAUC still verifies the bundle signature at install time, but there is no online version/compatibility check. Proceed ONLY if you are sure of the image's source and integrity.
update.manualConfirmCheckbox: I accept the risks of permanent device damage/data loss.
update.uploadError: Upload failed. Please ensure the file is correct and not corrupted.
update.rebootToActivate: Reboot to activate the new version.
update.reconnectTimeout: The device did not come back online in time. It may have rolled back — reload the page and check the running version.
update.serverUnreachable: Couldn't check for updates right now.

server.title: Server
server.enableDescription: Run SnapDog as a multiroom server
server.name: Name
server.knxNoZones: Create a zone before assigning KNX group addresses.
server.knxNoClients: Create a client before assigning KNX group addresses.
server.knxInvalidGa: Use main/middle/sub, for example 1/2/3. Allowed ranges: 0-31/0-7/0-255.
server.knxGatewayRequired: Gateway URL is required in KNX client mode.
server.saveFailed: Save failed. Check the configuration and try again.

about.title: About
about.description: Multi-zone audio controller with AirPlay, Spotify, Subsonic, MQTT and KNX integration

health.boot_not_mounted: Boot partition not mounted — OTA updates disabled
health.no_wlan: No WiFi adapter — Setup AP unavailable
health.no_inactive_partition: Inactive partition not found — updates disabled

tuning.title: Hardware Tuning
tuning.disableWifiDesc: Turns off the wireless radio to reduce electrical noise.
tuning.disableBluetoothDesc: Turns off the Bluetooth radio to reduce RF interference.
tuning.disableOnboardAudioDesc: Disables default 3.5mm jack & HDMI audio controllers to prevent conflicts.
tuning.exclusiveCoreDesc: Isolates CPU Core 3 and locks clock speed for glitch-free playback.
tuning.rebootNote: All changes take effect after a reboot.
tuning.applyPrompt: These changes need a reboot to take effect. Reboot now, or apply on the next reboot?
tuning.awaitingReboot: Saved. Changes apply on the next reboot.
